What are we looking for? Hypothesis?
predictiveness of transcriptional signatures for prognosis
differences in TLS state (across HGSOC anatomical sites?)
spatiotemporal gradient analysis of B-cell interactions/ B-cell heterogeneity
activity of TLS-resident immune cells

New expanded cohort? with relative clinical data available

Geomx? How to design the ROI selection criteria?
a higher-resolution view of TME and focusing on selected interactions
visualize and quantify spatial changes in the immune landscape during TLS maturation

Targets & Goals / GeoMx

BCR Sequencing? 
Perform B-cell receptor repertoire analysis? Combined this with spatial transcriptomics to map BCR clonotypes and their interactions with Tfh cells in TLS regions.
